clEntries.5.11.192: v5.11.191: Added 28 new Tuya device fingerprints from community reports and upstream sources, Added support for Nedis SmartLife Radiator Control (`_TZE284_ne4pikwm` / `TS0601`), Expanded compatibility for existing switch, sensor, and climate drivers with newly identified manufacturer variants
clEntries.5.11.191: Added 28 new device fingerprints, including Nedis SmartLife Radiator Control. Expanded compatibility across switch, sensor, and climate drivers.
clEntries.5.11.190: Added 27 new device fingerprints and low-battery alerts for 113 devices. Fixed SDK v3 flow crashes, restored missing battery capabilities, added time sync for 13 thermostats, and fixed missing capabilities in 10 remote drivers.
clEntries.5.11.189: Added 27 new device fingerprints including Nedis SmartLife Radiator. Fixed SDK v3 flow card crashes, resolved alarm_battery capability conflicts, and restored battery reporting. Added time sync for 13 TRV drivers and fixed missing capabilities in 10 remote drivers.
clEntries.5.11.188: Community sync: 27 new fingerprints added from Z2M/ZHA/forum/JohanBendz. Minor and forum improvements. Total: .
clEntries.5.11.186: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.186 adds 681 new fingerprints and updates 193 drivers.
